entries.content: adjective ① (long-lasting) 慢性的 mànxìng de ‹illness, bronchitis, arthritis›; 久病的 jiǔ bìng de ‹patient›; 长期的 chángqī de ‹alcoholism, unemployment›② figurative (habitual) 积习难改的 jīxí nán gǎi de ‹liar›③ British informal (bad) 糟透的 zāotòu de ‹performance, performer›
entries.name: adjective
